channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cam Ward breaks Bernie Kosar's single-season Miami passing yards and completions records
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Another week, another pair of records for Miami quarterback Cam Ward — breaking 40-year-old marks by Bernie Kosar in both cases.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Formula 1 expected to expand grid to 11 teams as early as next week for Cadillac to enter in 2026
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 is expected to approve grid expansion for an 11th team originally started by Michael Andretti as early as next week, The Associated Press has learned. The team will be called Cadillac F1 and powered by Ferrari engines when it enters the sport in 2026.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Guardiola's Man City stunned after conceding two early goals against Tottenham in 4-0 rout
item.description: Manchester City’s Premier League title challenge took a major blow after being thrashed 4-0 by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chelsea, Arsenal and Brighton close gap on Premier League leader Liverpool
item.description: Wins for Chelsea, Arsenal and Brighton saw them close the gap on Premier League leader Liverpool to six points on Saturday. Third-place Chelsea beat Leicester 2-1 in the early kickoff and Arsenal, in fourth, won 3-0 against Nottingham Forest.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: School district defends decision to ban parents who wore ‘XX’ wristbands at daughters’ game with trans athlete
item.description: A New Hampshire school district defended their move to ban those who supported biological girls-only sports, citing a potential "threat.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch the 49ers against the Packers on Sunday
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers face the Green Bay Packers at 1:25 p.m. PDT on Sunday, Nov. 17 at Lambeau Field in Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alyssa Nakken, first full-time female coach in MLB history, leaving Giants to join Guardians
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Alyssa Nakken, the first woman to coach in a Major League Baseball game, is leaving the San Francisco Giants to join the Cleveland Guardians. Nakken made history in 2022 when she took over as first-base coach following an ejection.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chase Elliott named NASCAR's most popular driver for 7th straight season
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chase Elliott was named NASCAR's most popular driver for the seventh consecutive year at the sport's season-ending awards ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Catholic school volleyball team could face penalty after fans boo trans athlete on public school team
item.description: A transgender volleyball player at a high school in northern California was reportedly booed and harassed during a match against a Catholic school Oct. 12.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Yin holes 3 long putts for 2-shot lead in LPGA finale. Nelly Korda shoots 66 to trail by 4
item.description: Angel Yin has a two-shot lead at the halfway point of the CME Group Tour Championship and the chase for the $4 million winner's check.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aaron Judge won't be bothered if Juan Soto gets bigger contract from Yankees than his $360M deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge won't be bothered if free agent Juan Soto gets a bigger deal from the New York Yankees than the captain's $360 million, nine-year contract. “It ain’t my money.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Local fighter wins WBC Muy Thai world title
item.description: Selina Flores, 26, recently won the WBC Muy Thai world title, making history as the third American woman to ever do so.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: LeBron James announces he's leaving social media
item.description: LeBron James is taking a break from social media, citing negativity online. The Lakers star posted a screengrab of a post from Rich Kleiman, Kevin Durant's longtime agent, to X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Hillsborough County man files lawsuit against Netflix over Tyson-Paul fight streaming issues
item.description: A class action lawsuit was filed in Hillsborough County on Monday against Netflix over alleged streaming issues during the fight between legendary brawler Mike Tyson and former YouTuber Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Andrei Vasilevskiy makes 29 saves for 36th NHL shutout, Lightning beat Devils 4-0
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 29 saves for his 36th career shutout to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the New Jersey Devils 4-0 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
